quote:
The river of conflict runs silent when the selfless servant of peace reaches to pull its stones apart.  

A village that feeds with compassion gnaws the iron band of fear that clenches its borders.  

Amidst the thunder of war, the quiet voice of reason hears louder than the clatter of judgments.  

The adventurous heart is bound to the earth; foreign wings will only soar if they learn to drip with humility.  

A healer who reuses a needle without thought feeds harm more than help.  

The true guard of a nation measures its compassion by the footprints left of those it leads home.  

A coin that circulates with no purpose simply loses its shine in the market of guilt.
quote_preview: The river of conflict runs silent when the selfless servant of peace reaches to pull its stones apart.
